2026-06-17T15:14:59.2244106Z ##[group]Run # Derive GH_HOST from GITHUB_SERVER_URL so the gh CLI targets the correct
2026-06-17T15:14:59.2245277Z [36;1m# Derive GH_HOST from GITHUB_SERVER_URL so the gh CLI targets the correct[0m
2026-06-17T15:14:59.2246282Z [36;1m# GitHub instance (GHES/GHEC). On github.com this is a harmless no-op.[0m
2026-06-17T15:14:59.2247517Z [36;1mGH_HOST="${GITHUB_SERVER_URL#https://}"[0m
2026-06-17T15:14:59.2248148Z [36;1mGH_HOST="${GH_HOST#http://}"[0m
2026-06-17T15:14:59.2248766Z [36;1mecho "GH_HOST=${GH_HOST}" >> "$GITHUB_ENV"[0m
2026-06-17T15:15:00.0710850Z shell: /usr/bin/bash --noprofile --norc -e -o pipefail {0}
2026-06-17T15:15:00.0711995Z ##[endgroup]
2026-06-17T15:15:00.1475577Z ##[group]Run set -euo pipefail
2026-06-17T15:15:00.1476251Z [36;1mset -euo pipefail[0m
2026-06-17T15:15:00.1483431Z [36;1mpackages_json=${AW_APM_PACKAGES:-null}[0m
2026-06-17T15:15:00.1484159Z [36;1mapps_json=${AW_APM_APPS:-null}[0m
2026-06-17T15:15:00.1484802Z [36;1mlegacy_id=${AW_APM_LEGACY_APP_ID:-}[0m
2026-06-17T15:15:00.1485392Z [36;1m[0m
2026-06-17T15:15:00.1485912Z [36;1m# gh-aw substitutes `["microsoft/apm#main"]` at[0m
2026-06-17T15:15:00.1487077Z [36;1m# compile time using Go's default slice formatter, which emits[0m
2026-06-17T15:15:00.1487973Z [36;1m# `[a b c]` (space-separated, no quotes) instead of valid JSON.[0m
2026-06-17T15:15:00.1488840Z [36;1m# That breaks `jq --argjson` below. Repair string-array inputs[0m
2026-06-17T15:15:00.1489715Z [36;1m# in place; leave already-valid JSON untouched. apps[] (objects)[0m
2026-06-17T15:15:00.1490575Z [36;1m# is not repairable this way -- consumers must use the legacy[0m
2026-06-17T15:15:00.1491492Z [36;1m# single-app inputs until upstream gh-aw exposes a JSON-encoding[0m
2026-06-17T15:15:00.1492256Z [36;1m# helper for import-inputs.[0m
2026-06-17T15:15:00.1492835Z [36;1mrepair_string_array() {[0m
2026-06-17T15:15:00.1493374Z [36;1m  local raw="$1"[0m
2026-06-17T15:15:00.1493931Z [36;1m  if [ -z "$raw" ] || [ "$raw" = "null" ]; then[0m
2026-06-17T15:15:00.1494548Z [36;1m    echo "$raw"; return[0m
2026-06-17T15:15:00.1495060Z [36;1m  fi[0m
2026-06-17T15:15:00.1495669Z [36;1m  if printf '%s' "$raw" | jq -e 'type=="array"' >/dev/null 2>&1; then[0m
2026-06-17T15:15:00.1496406Z [36;1m    echo "$raw"; return[0m
2026-06-17T15:15:00.1497105Z [36;1m  fi[0m
2026-06-17T15:15:00.1498256Z [36;1m  python3 -c 'import json, re, sys; s=sys.argv[1].strip(); s=s[1:-1] if s.startswith("[") and s.endswith("]") else s; print(json.dumps([t for t in re.split(r"[\s,]+", s) if t]))' "$raw"[0m
2026-06-17T15:15:00.1499495Z [36;1m}[0m
2026-06-17T15:15:00.1500068Z [36;1mpackages_json=$(repair_string_array "$packages_json")[0m
2026-06-17T15:15:00.1500729Z [36;1m[0m
2026-06-17T15:15:00.1501158Z [36;1mgroups=$(jq -nc \[0m
2026-06-17T15:15:00.1501729Z [36;1m  --argjson packages "$packages_json" \[0m
2026-06-17T15:15:00.1502634Z [36;1m  --argjson apps "$apps_json" \[0m
2026-06-17T15:15:00.1503231Z [36;1m  --arg legacy_id "$legacy_id" \[0m
2026-06-17T15:15:00.1503884Z [36;1m  --arg legacy_owner "${AW_APM_LEGACY_OWNER:-}" \[0m
2026-06-17T15:15:00.1504621Z [36;1m  --arg legacy_repos "${AW_APM_LEGACY_REPOS:-}" \[0m
2026-06-17T15:15:00.1505536Z [36;1m  'def slug(s): s | gsub("[^a-zA-Z0-9-]"; "-") | ascii_downcase | .[0:32];[0m
2026-06-17T15:15:00.1506399Z [36;1m   def with_id(g):[0m
2026-06-17T15:15:00.1507394Z [36;1m     g + (if (g.id // "") == "" then {id: ("auto-" + slug(g.owner // "default"))} else {} end);[0m
2026-06-17T15:15:00.1508261Z [36;1m   [[0m
2026-06-17T15:15:00.1509114Z [36;1m     (if (($packages // []) | length) > 0 and $legacy_id == ""[0m
2026-06-17T15:15:00.1510228Z [36;1m        then [{id:"default",kind:"default",index:0,owner:"",repositories:"",packages:$packages,("has-app"):"false"}][0m
2026-06-17T15:15:00.1511193Z [36;1m        else [] end),[0m
2026-06-17T15:15:00.1511731Z [36;1m     (if $legacy_id != ""[0m
2026-06-17T15:15:00.1512864Z [36;1m        then [with_id({id:"legacy",kind:"legacy",index:0,owner:$legacy_owner,repositories:$legacy_repos,packages:($packages // []),("has-app"):"true"})][0m
2026-06-17T15:15:00.1514014Z [36;1m        else [] end),[0m
2026-06-17T15:15:00.1514572Z [36;1m     (($apps // []) | to_entries | map([0m
2026-06-17T15:15:00.1515164Z [36;1m        with_id({[0m
2026-06-17T15:15:00.1515675Z [36;1m          id: (.value.id // ""),[0m
2026-06-17T15:15:00.1516237Z [36;1m          kind: "apps",[0m
2026-06-17T15:15:00.1517626Z [36;1m          index: .key,[0m
2026-06-17T15:15:00.1518200Z [36;1m          owner: (.value.owner // ""),[0m
2026-06-17T15:15:00.1518882Z [36;1m          repositories: (.value.repositories // ""),[0m
2026-06-17T15:15:00.1519752Z [36;1m          packages: (.value.packages // []),[0m
2026-06-17T15:15:00.1520424Z [36;1m          ("has-app"): "true"[0m
2026-06-17T15:15:00.1521042Z [36;1m        })))[0m
2026-06-17T15:15:00.1521516Z [36;1m   ] | add // []')[0m
2026-06-17T15:15:00.1522003Z [36;1m[0m
2026-06-17T15:15:00.1522463Z [36;1mcount=$(echo "$groups" | jq 'length')[0m
2026-06-17T15:15:00.1523054Z [36;1mif [ "$count" = "0" ]; then[0m
2026-06-17T15:15:00.1524259Z [36;1m  echo "::error::shared/apm.md import provided no packages. Add packages: <list>, single-app inputs (app-id + private-key), or apps: <list> in the with: block."[0m
2026-06-17T15:15:00.1525458Z [36;1m  exit 1[0m
2026-06-17T15:15:00.1525895Z [36;1mfi[0m
2026-06-17T15:15:00.1526307Z [36;1m[0m
2026-06-17T15:15:00.1527252Z [36;1mdups=$(echo "$groups" | jq -r '[.[].id] | group_by(.) | map(select(length > 1) | first) | join(", ")')[0m
2026-06-17T15:15:00.1528108Z [36;1mif [ -n "$dups" ]; then[0m
2026-06-17T15:15:00.1529171Z [36;1m  echo "::error::duplicate apm group ids after auto-derivation: $dups. Set apps[].id explicitly when two entries share the same owner."[0m
2026-06-17T15:15:00.1530231Z [36;1m  exit 1[0m
2026-06-17T15:15:00.1530673Z [36;1mfi[0m
2026-06-17T15:15:00.1531088Z [36;1m[0m
2026-06-17T15:15:00.1531521Z [36;1mwhile IFS= read -r id; do[0m
2026-06-17T15:15:00.1532142Z [36;1m  if ! echo "$id" | grep -Eq '^[a-z0-9-]{1,32}$'; then[0m
2026-06-17T15:15:00.1533210Z [36;1m    echo "::error::invalid apm group id: '$id' (lowercase alphanumeric and dashes, 1-32 chars). Set apps[].id explicitly."[0m
2026-06-17T15:15:00.1534185Z [36;1m    exit 1[0m
2026-06-17T15:15:00.1534639Z [36;1m  fi[0m
2026-06-17T15:15:00.1535137Z [36;1mdone < <(echo "$groups" | jq -r '.[].id')[0m
2026-06-17T15:15:00.1535750Z [36;1m[0m
2026-06-17T15:15:00.1536349Z [36;1m# Emit only id + package-count to logs to keep notice output tight.[0m
2026-06-17T15:15:00.1537422Z [36;1m# The matrix itself is non-secret under the env-relay design, but a[0m
2026-06-17T15:15:00.1538311Z [36;1m# condensed summary remains easier to scan in the run UI.[0m
2026-06-17T15:15:00.1538987Z [36;1m{[0m
2026-06-17T15:15:00.1539451Z [36;1m  echo "matrix={\"group\":$groups}"[0m
2026-06-17T15:15:00.1540203Z [36;1m} >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"[0m
2026-06-17T15:15:00.1540884Z [36;1mprintf "::notice::APM matrix: %d credential group(s)\n" "$count"[0m
2026-06-17T15:15:00.1541845Z [36;1mecho "$groups" | jq -r '.[] | "  - " + .id + " (" + (.packages | length | tostring) + " package(s))"'[0m
2026-06-17T15:15:00.1547250Z shell: /usr/bin/bash -e {0}

2026-06-17T15:15:00.1548183Z   GH_HOST: github.com

2026-06-17T15:15:00.1550073Z   AW_APM_LEGACY_REPOS:
